"'''Behind the Magic'''" was a recurring article in ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'', written by [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM's]] [[Rob Coleman]]. It first appeared in [[Star Wars Insider 58|''Star Wars Insider'' 58]], and appeared in most issues until its last appearance in [[Star Wars Insider 69|''Star Wars Insider'' 69]].
